plan.goal: 构建 MMS 代码知识图谱系统 - 初次可用版本

tasks.description: 初始化项目结构和 package.json，配置 TypeScript 和依赖
acceptance_criteria: 项目可以 npm install 成功
TypeScript 编译配置正确
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for low config task

tasks.description: 设计 SQLite 数据库 schema：nodes 表（symbol/file）和 edges 表（defines/imports/calls/references）
acceptance_criteria: schema 支持 symbol 和 file 节点类型
schema 支持 defines/imports/calls/references 边类型
包含位置信息（文件、行、列）
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium schema task

tasks.description: 实现 SCIP 索引解析器，支持 scip-typescript 和 scip-go 输出格式
acceptance_criteria: 能解析 SCIP protobuf 格式
提取 symbol、position、relationship 信息
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium-high algorithms task

tasks.description: 实现 fg-index CLI 工具：调用 SCIP indexer 并写入 SQLite
acceptance_criteria: 支持 --project 参数指定项目路径
自动检测项目类型（ts/go）
调用对应 scip-indexer
将结果写入 SQLite
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: 实现 fg-query CLI 工具：支持 findDefinition/findReferences/findCallers 查询
acceptance_criteria: findDefinition <symbol> 返回定义位置
findReferences <symbol> 返回所有引用
findCallers <symbol> 返回调用者列表
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: 实现增量更新机制：基于 git diff 检测变更文件
acceptance_criteria: 检测自上次索引以来的变更文件
仅重新索引变更文件
更新数据库中的节点和边
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium-high algorithms task

tasks.description: 实现 MindKeeper 整合：session 进入项目时自动触发索引
acceptance_criteria: 检测到项目根目录时检查索引状态
索引过期或不存在时自动触发 fg-index
提供配置项控制自动索引行为
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: 在 agent-im 目录构建索引并验证查询功能
acceptance_criteria: agent-im 目录成功构建索引
能回答 handleMessage 定义位置
能回答谁调用了 sendDiscordMessage
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium tests task

task_gaps: Missing task for defining CLI argument parsing strategy (e.g., using commander/yargs) — task-1 mentions deps but task-4/5 assume a CLI framework exists
No task for writing tests. Even a first-cut version needs at least integration tests for the SCIP parser (task-3) and query engine (task-5) to be verifiable

Task-3 is tagged medium-high but doesn't account for the fact that SCIP protobuf deserialization requires @sourcegraph/scip-bindings or a protobuf schema — installing/compiling native bindings on macOS/Linux can fail silently and needs its own step
Task-7 (MindKeeper integration) has no fallback if SCIP indexer binary is not installed on the system — need a graceful degradation or installation check
No task for handling multi-root monorepo scenarios (e.g., agent-im depends on other packages) — SCIP indexing assumes a single project root
task_redundancies: Task-1 (init project) and task-2 (schema design) could be merged — schema is part of initial project scaffolding and doing them together avoids an intermediate commit with empty package.json

Task-6 (incremental update via git diff) and task-4 (fg-index CLI) share git diff detection logic — consider whether the incremental logic should be embedded in task-4 from the start rather than added later
model_suggestions: task-3 (SCIP parser) should use kimi-k2.5 instead of kimi-for-coding — it requires understanding protobuf wire format and cross-language SCIP spec, which benefits from stronger reasoning
task-6 (incremental updates) is better suited for glm-5-turbo — it's mostly git operations and file I/O, not complex algorithm design
task-8 (integration validation) is better as glm-5-turbo — it's a smoke test task, not a design task
execution_order_issues: task-5 (query CLI) depends on task-2 (schema) but also implicitly on task-4 (index CLI) to have data to query against — task-8 partially addresses this but the gap means task-5 might ship untestable
task-6 (incremental updates) should run after task-4 AND task-8 — you need a working full-index pipeline verified before building incremental on top
task-7 (MindKeeper integration) depends on both CLI tools being stable — should be after task-8, not before
plan_discuss.overall_assessment: [glm-5-turbo] The plan has a reasonable skeleton but is not ready to execute as-is. The biggest risk is task-3 (SCIP parser): SCIP's protobuf-based format requires native bindings or hand-rolled proto decoding, and this complexity is underestimated. If task-3 fails or the bindings don't compile, the entire pipeline is blocked. I recommend adding a spike/feasibility task before task-3 to verify SCIP bindings work in the target environment. Additionally, the execution order should be adjusted to: 1→2→3→4→5→8→6→7, ensuring full pipeline works before adding incremental updates and MindKeeper integration.
